title: Pizza tower
description:
A very poorly made remake of pizza tower stuff in minecraft!

pizza tower by tour de pizza
body:
A recreation of pizza tower characters, structures and items! such as peppino, peppinos pizza and a literral pistol!

There are crafting recipes in the gallery since i dont know how to add images here. :(

If you want pizza tower in minecraft, Here you go!

Models are not 100% accurate though.

Pizza tower by tour de
